themes.title: Trump’s policies dominate global right-wing coverage
themes.blurb: President Trump's state visit to China and his administration's policies, including the Iran war and economic measures, are a dominant focus across multiple countries. Right-wing media in the US, Poland, Italy, Argentina, and France are extensively covering Trump's diplomatic efforts, economic strategies, and political influence, reflecting his continued global impact.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Extensive coverage of Trump's China visit, Iran war policies, and economic measures like gas tax suspension.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Focus on Trump's NATO discussions with Polish President Nawrocki and potential troop relocations.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Coverage of Trump's influence on Italian politics, including Meloni's alignment with Trump's policies.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Discussion of Trump's economic policies and their parallels with Milei's reforms in Argentina.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Analysis of Trump's diplomatic strategies and their implications for France's far-right movement.

themes.title: Far-right parties push 'national priority' policies
themes.blurb: Far-right parties in Spain, Italy, Sweden, and France are intensifying their focus on 'national priority' policies, emphasizing preferential treatment for citizens over immigrants in social services, housing, and employment. This theme is resonating strongly in regional elections and policy debates, reflecting a broader transnational trend in right-wing governance.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Proposals to prioritize Spanish nationals in social aid, healthcare, and housing, with strong campaign focus in Andalusia.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Debates on immigration controls and national preference in social policies, particularly in southern Italy.

countries.name: 🇸🇪 Sverigedemokraterna
countries.note: Policies aimed at restricting immigration and prioritizing Swedish citizens in welfare benefits.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Campaigns on national priority in employment and social services, with a focus on reducing immigration.

themes.title: Reform UK’s electoral surge reshapes UK politics
themes.blurb: Reform UK's significant gains in local elections are reshaping the UK's political landscape, challenging both Labour and Conservative parties. The coverage highlights Nigel Farage's influence, internal party dynamics, and the broader implications for British governance, with parallel discussions in the US and Italy about the rise of far-right movements.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Extensive coverage of Reform UK's electoral successes, leadership changes, and policy debates, particularly on immigration.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Analysis of Reform UK's rise as part of a broader transatlantic far-right movement, with comparisons to Trump's influence.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Discussion of Reform UK's impact on European far-right politics and potential parallels with Italy's political shifts.

themes.title: Corruption scandals rock far-right governments
themes.blurb: Corruption allegations and scandals are impacting far-right governments and parties across Argentina, Hungary, Poland, and Spain. These scandals are dominating media coverage, influencing public perception, and shaping political strategies, reflecting a broader pattern of governance challenges within far-right administrations.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Coverage of scandals involving Manuel Adorni and other government officials, impacting Milei's administration.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Allegations of corruption and misuse of public funds under the new Tisza government and former Fidesz administration.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Scandals involving party leaders, including Zbigniew Ziobro's controversial actions and internal party conflicts.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Allegations of financial irregularities and misuse of public resources in regional governments.

themes.title: Hungary’s political transition dominates coverage
themes.blurb: Hungary's political transition from Viktor Orbán's Fidesz to Péter Magyar's Tisza Party is a major focus in right-wing media. The coverage highlights the new government's policies, internal dynamics, and the broader implications for Hungary's domestic and international relations, with significant attention from the US and Poland.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Extensive coverage of the new Tisza government's formation, policies, and challenges to Orbán's legacy.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Analysis of Hungary's political transition and its implications for US-Hungary relations.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Discussion of Hungary's political changes and their impact on regional stability and NATO dynamics.
